name: Grilled Cheese-Chipotle Sandwich
recipeInstructions:
1. Spread each piece of bread with a thin coating of pureed chiles, or more if you prefer your sandwich spicy.
2. Cover the bottom slice with a layer of cheese, tomato slices, and as much cilantro as desired.
3. Top with the second slice of bread and spread butter on both sides.
4. Place the sandwich, butter-side down, in a cast-iron skillet.
5. Cook the sandwich slowly until the bottom is golden brown.
6. Turn the sandwich over and cook the other side, covering the pan to help melt the cheese while the bread crisps and turns golden.
7. Serve immediately with something cold to drink.
